input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IC.2.5.4 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:

            TITLE: the maximum allowable area of the inner diameter of the intake runner system between the

            CONTENT:
            rule IC.2.5.4: The maximum allowable area of the inner diameter of the intake runner system between the
IC.2.5.4 The maximum allowable area of the inner diameter of the intake runner system between the 
restrictor and throttle body is 2825 mm2

final_answer: The maximum allowable area of the inner diameter of the intake runner system between the restrictor and throttle body is 2825 mm2
